item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested sorting-table confirmer as the default action, identifies the repeated pattern of three prior downstream manual gates plus the fourth requested gate, reframes the problem as recurring upstream identity/control failure, and redirects to upstream ownership of batch identity before sorting. It does not add the manual confirmer as an action."}
